chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D- 1717 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 31.05.2022 Mian Taj Muhammad Keerio, advocate for petitioner. Mr. Khurram Shahzad, Additional Director General, Law & Zaheer Abbass Khowaja, Law Officer Election Commission of Pakistan alongwith Saleemuddin Dal District Election Commissioner Tharparkar, Prem Chand Additional D.C Mirpurkhas, Roshan Ali Jatoi DEC Mirpurkhas, Masood A. Qureshi REC Mirpurkhas, Lutuf Ali Mastoi E.O Umerkot, Muhammad Saleem Shaikh AC Shujaabad, Muhammad Yousuf Majeedano DEC Hyderabad and Ali Abdullah Khalid REC Hyderabad Mr. Muhammad Humayoon Khan DAG Mr. Habib ur Rehman Advocate for respondent / NADRA. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, Additional A.G Sindh. ----- In consideration of the objections, which are very material in natural as available at page 15, no reasonable explanations were provided by the Delimitation Authority. It was partly allowed to the extent for shifting of Block No.398060104 from Ward No.07 to Ward No.06 of Town Committee Chhore, whereas, no further reasons have been provided. In view of the order of the Division Bench in the case of Zulfiqar Ali Malik (C.P. No.D-328/2022), the impugned order is set-aside and in terms of Para-21(ii),(iv),(vi) of the said judgment, matter is remanded to the Delimitation Authority. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
